prompt: In image 1, replace the red 'SHOP NOW' button below the text with the red 'LOGOUT' button from image 3, maintaining the same size and position. Add the gray '24/7 Support' icon from image 2 to the top-right corner of the header, next to the 'My Account' text. Keep all other layout elements unchanged.
prompt_refined: Edit the website screenshot provided as image 1. In the main content area, replace the red 'SHOP NOW' button (located below the 'Get up to 30% Off New Arrivals' text) with the red 'LOGOUT' button shown in image 3, maintaining its exact size and position. In the top header bar, add the gray '24/7 Support' icon from image 2, placing it to the immediate left of the 'My Account' text in the top-right corner. All other layout elements and content within image 1 must remain unchanged.
objects: gray '24/7 Support' icon (to the immediate left of 'My Account' text)
